name: VibroSense Bias Generator
description: Beta-multiplier self-biased current reference. Produces Iref=500nA on SKY130. Root of all bias in the chip — must be bulletproof across all PVT corners.
margin_rule: Every spec must pass in all 5 corners (TT/SS/FF/SF/FS)

startup_time_us.description: Time from Vdd ramp to stable Iref

power_uw.description: Total power including all mirror copies
